description: As the administrator (Username: 'admin', Password: 'Admin1234!'), create a letter in the chart of patient Walter Bishop (DOB: 01/20/1948) with the subject 'Insurance Claim Denial - Action Required' and the content: 'Your claim for the visit on 01/15/2026 was denied by the payer due to missing coordination of benefits information.
